Monumental, 

unique &

charming

Monumental,
Unique &
Charming

Hotel Die Port van Cleve is ideally located in the city center of Amsterdam, right behind the Nieuwe Kerk on Dam Square and next to Magna Plaza. Many extraordinary sites that the city has to offer are within walking distance.

From our humble beginnings as a brewery in 1864 to becoming one of Amsterdam's most beloved hotels, Die Port van Cleve has been a witness to history, culture, and innovation. We look forward to welcoming you as our esteemed guest, and to experience the city in a historic way.

Bouillon d’Amsterdam

History

Location

Our Story

The story of Die Port van Cleve begins more than 150 years ago, with a young brewer named Gerard Heineken who met two clever businessmen, the Hulscher brothers. They had a great plan in mind, to open a beer house inside the brewery. After Heineken's approval, the Hulscher brothers embarked on this adventure and Die Port van Cleve was born....

Read more

Check-in & Check-out


Check-in: from 15:00
Check-out: before 11:00

​

Our Hotel at a Glance

  • 122 unique History Rooms, inspired by 8 rich historical themes

  • 6 floors

  • 2 elevators

​

On-site Highlights

  • Bar-Bodega De Blauwe Parade – a timeless spot for drinks and bites

  • Hulscher’s Restaurant – famous for our steaks and warm hospitality

  • The Brewery Club – our private meeting space, perfect for intimate gatherings

General Information

Luggage Storage & Early/Late Stays
We understand you may want to explore Amsterdam before your room is ready or after check-out. You're welcome to leave your luggage at reception. Early check-in or late check-out may also be arranged based on availability, for €15 per hour.

 

Travelling with Children
Need an extra bed? We’re happy to help. A supplementary bed is available upon

request at €75 per night.

 

Bookings via Third-Party Sites
If you’ve booked through a third-party website instead of our own secure site, please note that not all platforms display taxes and fees correctly. This may result in additional charges upon arrival. If this occurs, please contact the booking provider to request a refund. We can assist by providing an accurate invoice.

Offers

Nieuwe Kerk

Experience the historic Nieuwe Kerk, just across from our hotel, and enjoy an exclusive 20% discount on a full-fare ticket with code dieportvancleve20.

Use code dieportvancleve20

Celebrating 155 years

Die Port van Cleve is celebrating its 155th anniversary and has plannend a year-long celebration filled with special promotions and discounts on food, drinks, a small celebration gift and much more. Join us in celebrating this wonderful milestone!

More about our celebration

Win a Golden Ticket

To celebrate the recent opening of our one of a kind suite, The Emperors Crown Suite, you have the chance to win a golden ticket With a Golden Ticket you get a costless upgrade to the exclusive Emperor’s Crown Suite for your entire stay!

Sign up here

Custom brick set

This exclusive custom LEGO set honours that enduring legacy, capturing the character, charm and timeless stories that have lived within the walls of ‘De Poort’ for over a century and a half. 

Get yours here

Spring sale

Enjoy 30% off your room when you book a spring stay at Die Port van Cleve.
A central location, historic surroundings, and everything you need for a comfortable stay.

Use code Spring30
